A
THREE-MAN


RULE HERE

Look Out for Pratt Ma.
chine in New Charter


Project.

pages.raw_text:
Members Of the committee elect
ed by the people last Tuesday to
frame a new city charter have been
been warned against a movement
being quietly nursed by city hall
politicians and certain private in
terests to make the new commits
sion plan three-man government,
in which three men viii practically
have their own way and the mi
nority commissioners will be mere
figure heads.


The hackers of this move con-
template having an elective mayor.
to which they hope to elect Mayor
Pratt and at least two of his sup
porters, in which event Mayor
Pratt and his machine would have
such sway at the city hall as they
have never had before. The move
plans to form a flying wedge"
campaign for city commissioners
under the new charter with a COM
bine in which the Pratt machine
will take at least three of the
commissioners by conceding two to



lance.


Pfatt'S supporters on the last
commission fought for an elective
mayor, as they figured Pratt would
have a better show for reelection
to that position than any other.
The old committee voted down the
elective mayor idea and made the
mayor elective by the board of
commissioners mother words, the
same as the chairman Of the board.


Relieving in the theory that ito
the victors belong the spoils," there
are silent efforts on foot at the
present moment to control the
work of the new charter commits
sion. The members should beware
and assert their independence and
freedom of any machine or other
influence.
